response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; their resume lists senior and staff roles since 2012, with no indication of seeking entry-level work, and their deep expertise in DLang, embedded systems, and AI-agent infrastructure is irrelevant to the renewable energy platform's stack, which requires React, Nest.js, and PostgreSQL — areas only briefly mentioned amid a sea of unrelated technologies.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and Node.js experience across multiple roles
Strong full-stack exposure including React and REST APIs
Proven ability to work with databases and deploy systems (Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior/staff experience, not entry-level
Lacks clear focus on required stack (Nest.js, PostgreSQL, AWS services)
German language skill is only basic, but role requires high on-site presence in Berlin
